title: Warden Drop
description: Warden now is useful to kill, finally.
body:
This mod gives killing the warden a use.

Yeah, he can drop an item that can be used to brew a new potion!

You can brew the potion of vulling with a warden flesh, that can be dropped by killing the warden!

The potion of vulling makes you take damage when you aren't getting any damage, and being damaged heals you!
